title: Serious issue: Bombay High Court issues notice to Centre on plea alleging export of LPG being prioritised amid domestic shortage
description: The Nagpur bench of Bombay High Court on Thursday issued notice to the Union government and Confidence Petroleum India Ltd (CPIL) on a plea by six Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) dealers alleging that exports are being prioritised over domestic supply amid acute shortage of LPG [Omkar Sales and Ors v. Union of India and Ors]A Division Bench of Justices Anil S Kilor and Raj D Wakode termed the issue as "serious" and of grave importance. Till the petition is finally decided, the bench dire
